title: Update WhatsApp message text to proper artwork inquiry

requirements.summary: Replace all occurrences of the WhatsApp pre-filled message text 'Hello Mudit Sharma' with a proper artwork inquiry message across Navigation, HeroSection, ContactSection, and Footer components
acceptanceCriteria: The WhatsApp link in the Navigation 'Hire Me' button opens WhatsApp with the new artwork inquiry message pre-filled.
The WhatsApp link in the HeroSection 'Hire Me' CTA button opens WhatsApp with the new artwork inquiry message pre-filled.
The WhatsApp card in ContactSection uses the new inquiry message in any WhatsApp href link.
The WhatsApp link in the Footer uses the new inquiry message.
No instance of 'Hello Mudit Sharma' remains as a WhatsApp pre-filled message anywhere in the frontend codebase.
The message text is professional, contextually relevant to artwork/mural inquiries, and written in English.

file_operations.description: Update the WhatsApp href link in the 'Hire Me' button to use the new pre-filled message: 'Hello, I came across your artwork portfolio and I'm interested in discussing a potential project. Could you please share more details about your services and availability?' The URL-encoded message should replace the current 'Hello Mudit Sharma' text in the WhatsApp link parameter.

Update the WhatsApp href link in the HeroSection 'Hire Me' CTA button to use the new pre-filled message: 'Hello, I came across your artwork portfolio and I'm interested in discussing a potential project. Could you please share more details about your services and availability?' The URL-encoded message should replace the current 'Hello Mudit Sharma' text in the WhatsApp link parameter.

Update the WhatsApp card's href link to use the new pre-filled message: 'Hello, I came across your artwork portfolio and I'm interested in discussing a potential project. Could you please share more details about your services and availability?' The URL-encoded message should replace the current 'Hello Mudit Sharma' text in the WhatsApp link parameter.

Update the WhatsApp href link in the Footer contact info section to use the new pre-filled message: 'Hello, I came across your artwork portfolio and I'm interested in discussing a potential project. Could you please share more details about your services and availability?' The URL-encoded message should replace the current 'Hello Mudit Sharma' text in the WhatsApp link parameter.
